question: This software will give us a core competitive advantage
A 70-80% fit already exists in the market
The cost of a bought solution is considerably more than the cost of building, maintaining, and supporting self-built software over the next five years
You are capable of building and maintaining software that meets the relevant security, regulatory and legal requirements (eg. data protection)
You understand the needs of your users, and can clearly document those needs for the developers or AI
You are prepared to keep the software updated as security risks are identified
You can find people with the skills who are willing to manage the infrastructure required to run the software
